properties.description: Migrated from SSIS package SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts. Orchestrates: flag check → IfCondition(flag==1) wrapping InsertEmailRecords → CollectDailySIIMetric → OnlySendOnceAWeek.

activities.name: LKP_Check_Todays_Data
activities.description: Replaces SSIS Execute SQL Task. Reads flag from tbl_VulnActive_Daily_Static to determine if today's iTracker data is present. Returns firstRow.flag = 1 (data exists) or 0 (no data).

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(MAX([iTracker_Import_date]) AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_VulnActive_Daily_Static]

activities.name: IfTodaysDataExists
activities.description: Replicates SSIS EvalOp=3 (Expression AND Success). Only executes InsertEmailRecords when flag == 1. ifFalse is empty — pipeline exits cleanly when no data, matching SSIS behaviour.

ifTrueActivities.name: ST_Insert_Email_Records
ifTrueActivities.description: Replaces SSIS Execute SQL Task 'Insert Records into Email Alerts Tbl'. DML (INSERT) — Script activity per migration rule.

scripts.text: INSERT INTO [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_ssis_utility] ([To], [Subject], [body], [ReceiveDate], [SendDate], [BodyFormat], [CC]) SELECT [To_], [subject_], [body], GETDATE() [RECEIVEDATE], NULL, 2, [CC] FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[vw_SII_EmailAlerts_Daily] WHERE [To_] IS NOT NULL;

activities.name: DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1
activities.description: Replaces SSIS Data Flow Task 'Collect Daily SII Metric'. Reads Parquet source (vw_SII_EmailAlerts_Details staged), adds Import_Date derived column, writes to Parquet sink (tbl_SII_Vuln_History_Alerts target). Depends on IfTodaysDataExists Succeeded — runs only when the IfCondition completes (i.e. flag was 1 and InsertEmailRecords succeeded).

activities.name: ST_Only_Send_Once_A_Week
activities.description: Replaces SSIS Execute SQL Task 'Only Send once a week'. Checks Calendar table; stamps SendDate on pending tbl_ssis_utility rows if today is not Monday and not a holiday. DML (UPDATE) — Script activity per migration rule.

scripts.text: DECLARE @updatedate DATE = (SELECT CASE WHEN isHoliday = 0 AND DATENAME(weekday, GETDATE()) <> 'Monday' THEN CurrentDate ELSE NULL END AS updatedate FROM Calendar WHERE CurrentDate = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)); UPDATE tbl_ssis_utility SET SendDate = @updatedate WHERE SendDate IS NULL;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Dataflow_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Pipeline_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Pipeline_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Src_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Src_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Src_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Tgt_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Tgt_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Tgt_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Tgt_Table_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_SII_Vuln_Email_Alerts_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Collect_Daily_SII_Metric_1') AS Tgt_Schema_Name,

annotations: Original connection manager: PLHS (DWDL0535V1\DL053511, database PLHS)
GAP 1 RESOLVED: IfCondition wraps only InsertEmailRecords (replicates SSIS EvalOp=3). CollectDailySIIMetric and OnlySendOnceAWeek are top-level activities depending on IfTodaysDataExists Succeeded.
